title: Fundamental Structure of a Group
description: A diagram illustrating the four axioms (closure, associativity, identity, and invertibility) that a set and an operation must satisfy to form a group.
relationships: Operation ● is applied to elements in Set G
Identity Element e leaves any element a unchanged: a ● e = e ● a = a
Every element a has an Inverse a⁻¹ such that a ● a⁻¹ = a⁻¹ ● a = e
